settings.hero_heading:
Every Ingredient
Has a Purpose.
Every Calorie
Earns Its Place.
settings.hero_subheading: Ingredients designed for the gut-brain axis - supporting gut health, stable energy, and real satiety. All within 100 calories.
settings.hero_micro: ✓ No sugar alcohols   ✓ No palm oil   ✓ No artificial anything
settings.framework_subheading: WHY IT WORKS: Every ingredient is selected for a specific role in supporting the gut-brain axis - working together to support energy, satiety, mood, and digestion.
settings.dosing_body: Most functional snacks include trace amounts of 'functional' ingredients - enough for the label, not enough to make a difference. We formulate differently. Every active ingredient is included at levels aligned with clinical research - so your gut and brain can actually use them.
settings.dosing_callout: Every ingredient is chosen to earn its place. Functional nutrition without the caloric cost.
settings.library_subheading: Every ingredient across all products - organized by function. Click any card to see the science, the gut-brain benefit, and which products it appears in.
settings.sweet_body_1: Many low-carb snacks rely on erythritol and maltitol to hit their sweetness targets. These compounds are common gut irritants that can disrupt your microbiome - the opposite of what we're building toward.
settings.sweet_body_2: We use monk fruit and allulose instead. Both provide sweetness without glycemic impact, without gut disruption, and without the bloating that sugar alcohols cause.
settings.action_eyebrow: Ingredients designed for the gut-brain axis
settings.action_subheading: Explore the snacks that use these ingredients in real formulations.
settings.quiz_subheading: Now that you know what's inside - find out which formulation was built for your gut-brain pattern. 60 seconds. Personalized to you.

settings.label: Natural Sweeteners

settings.title: Prebiotic Fiber
settings.description: Feeds beneficial gut bacteria that regulate digestion, produce neurotransmitters, and signal the brain through the gut-brain axis.

settings.title: Protein
settings.description: Activates satiety hormones in the gut and brain simultaneously - slowing glucose absorption and keeping energy stable between meals.

settings.title: Adaptogens
settings.description: Help regulate cortisol - the stress hormone that disrupts gut-brain signaling and drives reactive cravings. Calmer cortisol, calmer cravings.

settings.title: Antioxidants & Plant Compounds
settings.description: Protect the gut lining and support brain circulation - reducing oxidative stress along the gut-brain communication pathway.

settings.label: Adaptogens per 100 Calories
settings.subtext: Within the range used in clinical studies on cortisol and stress response

settings.label: Prebiotic fiber per 100 Calories
settings.subtext: A meaningful daily contribution to microbiome-supportive fiber intake

settings.label: Calories. That's it.
settings.subtext: Functional nutrition without the caloric cost - every calorie earns its place

settings.name: Chicory Root Fiber
settings.tagline: Natural prebiotic fiber - the gut's preferred fuel
settings.what_it_is: Inulin-type prebiotic fiber derived from chicory root. One of the most studied prebiotic fibers in gut health research.
settings.why_it_matters: Feeds beneficial gut bacteria — Bifidobacterium and Lactobacillus — that regulate digestion, reduce bloating, and support immune function.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Supports microbiome diversity and serotonin production — 95% of which is made in the gut. A healthier microbiome sends clearer signals to the brain.
settings.read_more_text: Why Prebiotic Fiber Matters for Gut Health →

settings.name: Tapioca Soluble Fiber
settings.tagline: Gentle, gut-friendly fiber - easy to digest
settings.what_it_is: A soluble dietary fiber derived from tapioca starch. Neutral taste, smooth texture — one of the most gut-comfortable fiber sources available.
settings.why_it_matters: Supports healthy digestion without the bloating associated with some other fiber sources. Feeds beneficial gut bacteria while keeping net carbs low.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Gentle prebiotic action supports a diverse microbiome — the foundation of healthy gut-brain communication and stable mood.

settings.name: Organic Pea Protein
settings.tagline: Complete plant protein - high bioavailability
settings.what_it_is: Protein isolate derived from yellow split peas. High in branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs), particularly arginine, which supports heart health.
settings.why_it_matters: One of the most digestible plant proteins available. Supports muscle maintenance, satiety, and sustained energy without digestive discomfort.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Activates satiety hormones (GLP-1, PYY) in the gut that signal the brain to stop eating — reducing reactive snacking and cravings.

settings.name: Organic Brown Rice Protein
settings.tagline: Complementary plant protein - smooth texture
settings.what_it_is: Protein concentrate derived from whole grain brown rice. Paired with pea protein to create a complete amino acid profile comparable to animal protein.
settings.why_it_matters: Together with pea protein, creates a full-spectrum amino acid profile. Easy to digest, hypoallergenic, and gentle on the gut.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Supports steady amino acid absorption — the building blocks for neurotransmitters including serotonin and dopamine.
settings.read_more_text: Plant Protein and the Gut-Brain Axis →

settings.name: Milk Protein Concentrate
settings.tagline: High-quality complete protein - casein and whey
settings.what_it_is: A concentrated dairy protein containing both casein and whey fractions — providing both fast-acting and slow-releasing protein.
settings.why_it_matters: High biological value with a complete amino acid profile. The slow-digesting casein provides prolonged satiety after snacking.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Slow casein digestion extends satiety hormone signaling — keeping the gut-brain fullness loop active for longer after eating.

settings.name: Pea Protein Crisps
settings.tagline: Texture + protein - satisfying crunch
settings.what_it_is: Pea protein and rice starch formed into light, crunchy crisps. Adds texture and protein content simultaneously.
settings.why_it_matters: Delivers satisfying crunch alongside functional protein — addressing both the sensory craving and the nutritional need at once.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Protein at snack time activates GLP-1 signaling — the satiety hormone that communicates directly with the brain's hunger centre.

settings.name: Organic Almond Flour
settings.tagline: Grain-free base - protein, fiber and healthy fat
settings.what_it_is: Finely ground blanched almonds. A grain-free, gluten-free flour alternative that contributes protein, fiber, and monounsaturated fat.
settings.why_it_matters: Replaces refined flour without the glycemic impact. Provides texture, structure, and nutritional density in every bite.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Low glycemic — avoids glucose spikes that disrupt gut-brain signaling and lead to energy crashes.

settings.name: Organic Almond Butter
settings.tagline: Rich in healthy fats, fiber, and plant protein
settings.what_it_is: Whole roasted organic almonds ground into a smooth butter. A whole-food fat source with natural vitamin E, magnesium, and fiber.
settings.why_it_matters: Monounsaturated fats support satiety and slow digestion — extending the feeling of fullness and preventing blood sugar spikes.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Healthy fats stabilize blood sugar and support brain signaling. Magnesium in almonds supports serotonin synthesis.

settings.name: Organic Peanut Butter
settings.tagline: Whole-food fat and protein - deeply satisfying
settings.what_it_is: Ground organic roasted peanuts. Rich in oleic acid, niacin, and resveratrol — a whole-food fat with a strong satiety effect.
settings.why_it_matters: High in protein and fat — the combination that most effectively triggers both gut satiety hormones and brain fullness signals.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Resveratrol in peanuts supports gut microbiome diversity. Protein + fat together deliver the strongest satiety signal.
settings.read_more_text: Healthy Fats and the Gut-Brain Axis →

settings.name: Organic MCT Oil
settings.tagline: Fast brain fuel - from organic coconut
settings.what_it_is: Medium-chain triglycerides from organic coconut. Unlike long-chain fats, MCTs bypass normal fat digestion and convert rapidly to ketones.
settings.why_it_matters: Provides immediate, clean energy without a glucose spike. Supports mental clarity and focus, particularly during low-carb periods.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Ketones from MCT oil are preferred brain fuel. Supports cognitive function and focus through the gut-brain axis without disrupting blood sugar.

settings.name: Organic Flaxseed Oil
settings.tagline: Plant-based omega-3 - anti-inflammatory
settings.what_it_is: Cold-pressed oil from organic flaxseeds. One of the richest plant sources of alpha-linolenic acid (ALA), an omega-3 fatty acid.
settings.why_it_matters: Omega-3s reduce systemic inflammation — a key driver of gut dysbiosis and impaired gut-brain communication.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: ALA supports brain cell membrane integrity and reduces neuroinflammation — protecting the brain end of the gut-brain axis.

settings.name: Organic High Oleic Sunflower Oil
settings.tagline: Stable cooking fat - heart-healthy oleic acid
settings.what_it_is: A high-stability sunflower oil variant with a very high oleic acid content (80%+). More heat-stable than regular sunflower oil with a clean, neutral flavor.
settings.why_it_matters: Oleic acid (also found in olive oil) supports heart health, reduces inflammation, and provides a clean fat source without the instability of polyunsaturated oils.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Anti-inflammatory oleic acid supports gut microbiome diversity and reduces intestinal inflammation — protecting gut-brain communication pathways.
settings.read_more_text: Healthy Fats and the Gut-Brain Axis →

settings.name: Organic Sunflower Lecithin
settings.tagline: Natural emulsifier - clean label alternative
settings.what_it_is: A phospholipid derived from sunflower seeds. Used as a natural emulsifier to blend fats and liquids smoothly — without soy lecithin.
settings.why_it_matters: Choline-rich lecithin supports liver function and fat metabolism. The sunflower source avoids GMO soy concerns.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Choline is a precursor to acetylcholine — a neurotransmitter essential for memory and cognitive function. Supports the brain side of the gut-brain axis.

settings.name: Organic Ashwagandha Extract
settings.tagline: KSM-66® - clinically studied stress adaptogen
settings.what_it_is: Organic root extract of Withania somnifera — a traditional Ayurvedic adaptogen used for centuries. Standardized to withanolide content for consistent potency.
settings.why_it_matters: Clinically shown to reduce cortisol levels, support the HPA axis, and improve stress resilience. Reduces stress-driven food cravings.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Cortisol regulation is central to the gut-brain axis. When cortisol is balanced, stress-eating and reactive cravings quiet down — naturally.

settings.name: Organic Amla Fruit Powder
settings.tagline: Ayurvedic adaptogen - stress, immunity and gut resilience
settings.what_it_is: Dried powder of Phyllanthus emblica (Indian Gooseberry). A cornerstone of Ayurvedic medicine used for centuries as a rasayana — a rejuvenating adaptogen that supports resilience across multiple body systems.
settings.why_it_matters: Amla helps the body adapt to physiological stress — supporting adrenal function, immune resilience, and metabolic balance. Its polyphenol density also makes it one of the most antioxidant-rich foods known.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Polyphenols act as prebiotics, feeding beneficial bacteria and supporting microbiome diversity. Adaptogenic properties help buffer the cortisol-craving loop through the gut-brain axis.

settings.name: Organic Cocoa Powder
settings.tagline: Flavanol-rich - mood and circulation support
settings.what_it_is: Alkalized organic cocoa powder. Rich in flavanols — polyphenolic compounds with antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and vasodilatory effects.
settings.why_it_matters: Cocoa flavanols support blood flow, reduce oxidative stress, and have been linked to improved cognitive function and mood in clinical studies.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Flavanols support microbiome diversity and brain circulation — protecting both ends of the gut-brain axis simultaneously.

settings.name: Organic Unsweetened Chocolate Chips
settings.tagline: Real chocolate - no sugar, pure cacao
settings.what_it_is: Chocolate chips made from organic cacao with no added sugar. Delivers the full chocolate flavor and antioxidant profile without glycemic impact.
settings.why_it_matters: Provides a real chocolate experience — the texture, melt, and flavor — without sugar that would spike blood glucose and undermine the formula.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Cacao polyphenols support microbiome diversity. No added sugar means no glucose spike disrupting gut-brain signaling.

settings.name: Organic Amla Fruit Powder
settings.tagline: Indian Gooseberry - potent polyphenol source
settings.what_it_is: Dried powder of Phyllanthus emblica (Indian Gooseberry) — one of the most antioxidant-dense fruits in Ayurvedic medicine. Exceptionally high in vitamin C and polyphenols.
settings.why_it_matters: Supports immune function, metabolic health, and gut integrity. High tannin content protects against oxidative damage in the gut lining.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Polyphenols from amla act as prebiotics — feeding beneficial bacteria and supporting microbiome diversity that influences brain health and mood.

settings.name: Organic Kale Powder
settings.tagline: Nutrient-dense green - vitamins K, C, and A
settings.what_it_is: Dried and powdered organic kale. Concentrates the nutritional profile of kale — vitamins K, C, A, and B6, plus calcium, potassium, and antioxidant kaempferol.
settings.why_it_matters: Adds a dense micronutrient profile to a savory snack — something most snacks in the category completely lack. Kaempferol has shown anti-inflammatory and neuroprotective effects.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Kaempferol supports gut microbiome diversity and has neuroprotective properties — protecting the integrity of gut-brain signaling pathways.

settings.name: Organic Rosemary Extract
settings.tagline: Natural preservative - antioxidant protection
settings.what_it_is: Concentrated extract from organic rosemary leaves. Used as a natural antioxidant to preserve freshness — replacing synthetic preservatives like BHA and BHT.
settings.why_it_matters: Protects the omega-3 fats in flaxseed and MCT oil from oxidation — keeping every ingredient performing as intended throughout shelf life.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Rosemary polyphenols (carnosic acid, rosmarinic acid) have anti-inflammatory effects in the gut and have shown neuroprotective properties in research.

settings.name: Organic Monk Fruit Extract
settings.tagline: Zero glycemic - 200× sweeter than sugar
settings.what_it_is: Concentrated extract of Luo Han Guo (monk fruit). Sweetness comes from mogrosides — compounds that provide intense sweetness with zero calories and zero glycemic impact.
settings.why_it_matters: Unlike sugar alcohols (erythritol, maltitol), monk fruit doesn't disrupt gut bacteria or cause digestive discomfort. It's the cleanest sweetener option available.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Zero glucose impact means no insulin spike and no disruption to gut-brain signaling. Sweetness without the consequences.

settings.name: Allulose
settings.tagline: Rare sugar - acts like sugar, metabolizes like fiber
settings.what_it_is: A rare naturally-occurring monosaccharide found in small amounts in figs and raisins. Tastes and bakes like sugar but is mostly excreted without being metabolized.
settings.why_it_matters: Provides the functional texture and caramelization of sugar in baking with approximately 0.4 kcal/g vs sugar's 4 kcal/g. Supports the fudgy brownie texture authentically.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Research suggests allulose may improve insulin sensitivity and has no negative effect on gut microbiota — unlike most sugar substitutes.

settings.name: Himalayan Pink Salt
settings.tagline: Mineral-rich salt - trace elements intact
settings.what_it_is: Unrefined salt from ancient sea beds in Pakistan. Contains trace minerals including magnesium, potassium, and calcium — absent in refined table salt.
settings.why_it_matters: Balances flavor naturally, enhances sweetness perception, and contributes trace minerals that support electrolyte balance.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Magnesium in Himalayan salt supports serotonin synthesis and GABA production — both key neurotransmitters in gut-brain signaling.

settings.name: Organic Cacao/Cocoa Butter
settings.tagline: Pure cacao fat - smooth melt, no dairy
settings.what_it_is: The natural fat extracted from cacao beans during chocolate production. Stable saturated fat with a clean, rich flavor and luxurious melt point.
settings.why_it_matters: Creates authentic chocolate texture and mouthfeel without dairy. A stable, natural fat source that resists oxidation and contributes no sugar.
settings.gut_brain_benefit: Stearic acid in cocoa butter is converted to oleic acid in the body — supporting anti-inflammatory pathways that protect gut-brain communication.
